Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development, is present. Represented by Mary Gilespi
Attorney, Michael Rosooff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jocelyn Dickinson, is present.
Attorney, Paul Nathan , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Begert, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.514 , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
